title: Ghosts, Italian Style
writer: Eduardo De Filippo, Renato Castellani, Adriano Baracco
actors: Sophia Loren, Vittorio Gassman, Mario Adorf
plot: Married couple Pasquale and Maria live in a palace supposedly haunted by ghosts and pay no rent. When Pasquale finds some food in the cupboard. he thinks the ghosts are at work, but it is actually Maria's lover, a very rich man wh...
